rules.description: Calibration confidence offset should be capped at ±10 points (not raw delta)
rules.problem: Confidence scores occasionally swing ±30-50 points from calibration offsets, causing nonsensical signals
rules.fix_applied: Cap calibration offset at ±10 points in confidence_scorer.py

rules.description: Deduplicate signals within 5 minutes and same symbol/side to prevent signal flooding
rules.problem: Multiple near-identical signals fire within seconds of each other, wasting API quota and causing duplicate positions
rules.fix_applied: 5-minute cooldown per symbol/side pair in signal_pipeline.py

rules.description: Enforce minimum stop-loss width of 0.5% to prevent noise-level stops
rules.problem: Very tight stops (0.1-0.3%) getting hit immediately on spread, not real moves
rules.fix_applied: 0.5% minimum SL in leverage.py; signals with tighter SL are widened

rules.description: Enforce minimum TP1 distance of 0.8% from entry
rules.problem: TP targets set below spread/slippage threshold never fill
rules.fix_applied: 0.8% minimum TP1 in leverage.py

rules.description: Enforce minimum R:R of 1.5 before entering any trade
rules.problem: Low R:R trades (<1.2) have negative EV even at 55% WR
rules.fix_applied: R:R >= 1.5 check in signal_pipeline.py gate 3

rules.description: Morning session (06:00-12:00 UTC) consistently wins 71% across instruments
rules.problem: Non-morning sessions win only 33-50% — strong time-of-day filter needed
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate active at 20% — track treatment_wr vs baseline_wr=0.35
rules.action: Boost confidence floor by +5 points for morning-window signals; reduce by -10 for night/afternoon
rules.disabled_reason: RUN120 auto-fix: Underlying meta_learning insight invalidated at 96% confidence. Live morning WR=28% on 18 trades (-$76.94) directly contradicts claimed 71% WR. Boosting confidence for a -$76.94/18-trade window is harmful. Re-enable only after 25+ new live morning trades show WR>=50%.

rules.description: Require confidence >= 70% before any trade entry
rules.problem: Sub-70% confidence trades produce 33% WR on 45 trades — worse than random
rules.fix_applied: 70% confidence floor in signal_pipeline.py

rules.description: HYPE positions carry 50% size due to confirmed negative EV per dollar vs BTC/SOL
rules.problem: HYPE avg loss 54% larger than avg win despite >50% WR; negative EV at scale
rules.fix_applied: 0.5x size multiplier for HYPE in leverage.py

rules.description: Night session (00:00-06:00 UTC) produces catastrophic 7-15% WR — full trading suspension
rules.problem: Night session WR=7-15% on 13 trades; every trade in this window is a near-certain loss
rules.fix_applied: Gate escalated to 100% — full block on night session signals

rules.description: Block trades in illiquid market regime — 28% WR confirmed
rules.problem: Illiquid regime trades produce 28% WR on 57 trades — clearly negative EV
rules.fix_applied: Block signals in illiquid regime in signal_pipeline.py

rules.description: Penalize confidence -15 points in ranging regime — 25% WR confirmed
rules.problem: Ranging regime trades produce 25% WR on 16 trades — confidence inflation in sideways markets
rules.fix_applied: -15pt confidence penalty in ranging regime

rules.description: SOL LONG at 53.3% WR but -$2.62/trade avg — needs tight entry conditions
rules.problem: SOL LONG is marginally profitable by WR but avg PnL is negative due to R:R issues
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: SOL LONG requires trending regime + confidence >= 75% in 20% of signals

rules.description: BTC SHORT in 70-80% confidence band — 38% WR, negative EV
rules.problem: BTC SHORT at medium confidence (70-80%) wins only 38% — specific confidence band issue
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: block BTC SHORT when confidence in 70-80% range in 20% of signals

rules.description: 85-90% confidence signals show WORSE WR than 70-85% — paradox sizing intervention
rules.problem: Confidence paradox: 85-90% conf = 40.8% WR vs 70-85% = 52.3% WR. Inverse relationship confirmed.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: reduce size 0.75x when confidence in 85-90% range

rules.description: 89% of SL hits are instant (<6 min) — stop width too tight, adding buffer
rules.problem: 89% instant SL rate indicates stops set within spread/noise. Avg stop width 0.86% vs needed 1.2%+
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: widen SL by 1.2x multiplier on signals where ATR-based width < 1.0%

rules.description: Cap HYPE position size at 0.5x normal regardless of confidence — confirmed negative EV
rules.problem: HYPE -$28,420 SL losses on 155 trades. Even with 55% WR, avg loss $183 vs avg win $107. Position sizing amplifies negative R:R.
rules.fix_applied: Hard cap: HYPE positions max 0.5x normal size, no override

rules.description: Block HYPE_LONG signals — live WR=23% on 35 trades, -$77.26 total
rules.problem: HYPE_LONG is #2 bleeder (-$77.26 live). 23% WR is definitively negative-EV at any R:R below 3.3:1
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20% — 20% of HYPE_LONG signals blocked outright; remainder require conf>=85 + trending + morning to pass

rules.description: SOL SHORT is primary alpha source — 63.7% WR, +$32.44/trade on 179 trades
rules.problem: SOL SHORT is significantly outperforming other setups. Current routing treats it same as other signals.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: SOL SHORT signals get 1.25x size boost in 20% treatment cohort

rules.description: BTC LONG is secondary alpha source — 63.9% WR, +$25.55/trade on 72 trades
rules.problem: BTC LONG consistently outperforms. Current routing does not differentiate.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: BTC LONG signals get 1.2x size boost in 20% treatment cohort

rules.description: HYPE SHORT overall negative EV despite 54% WR — size restriction + confidence gate
rules.problem: HYPE SHORT avg loss $162 vs avg win $105. Net EV negative despite above-50% WR.
rules.fix_applied: HYPE SHORT: require confidence >= 70% + reduce size to 0.5x (stacking with HYPE_sizing_cap)

rules.description: SHORT trades globally underperform LONGs in current regime — confidence penalty
rules.problem: SHORT WR 46.4% vs LONG WR 39.5% in full period but recent 100d shows reversal. Monitoring.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20%: SHORT signals require +5pt confidence buffer in treatment cohort

rules.description: 90%+ confidence SHORT trades are the primary profit driver. Amplify this edge.
rules.problem: 90%+ confidence SHORT trades account for $2942 of total $905 PnL (325%). 9.4% of trades carry all profitability. BTC_SHORT@90%+: 67.4% WR $4425. SOL_SHORT@90%+: 71.4% WR $548.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: boost SHORT position size 1.5x when confidence >= 90%. Monitor for 20% of qualifying trades.
rules.notes: HYPE_SHORT@90%+ excluded from boost (42% WR, -$1135 — separate block rule HYPE_SHORT_block_high_conf)

rules.description: 60-70% confidence trades destroy -$2321 PnL — hard block below 70%
rules.problem: 60-70% confidence: 46.3% WR on 123 trades, -$2321 PnL, -$18.87/trade. Worst confidence bin by PnL.
rules.fix_applied: Block signals with confidence < 70% — escalated from soft penalty to hard gate

rules.description: HYPE SHORT at 90%+ confidence is paradoxically worse — 42% WR, -$1135. High conf is miscalibrated here.
rules.problem: HYPE_SHORT@90%+: 42.3% WR on 26 trades, -$1135 PnL. HYPE_SHORT overall is 54.4% WR but high-confidence filter selects the bad ones. Likely confidence calibration error specific to HYPE SHORT overconfidence scenarios.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: block HYPE SHORT signals when confidence >= 90%. 20% of HYPE SHORT signals tested.
rules.notes: Counter-intuitive finding: high confidence HYPE SHORT = worse outcome. Normal HYPE_SHORT block covers 75%+ conf per Run120 tracking rule.

rules.description: SOL HIGH CONF (80%+) edge — 65.3% WR, +$28.32/trade — specialized routing
rules.problem: SOL at high confidence significantly outperforms. Need dedicated routing to amplify this edge.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate: SOL signals with confidence >= 80% get 1.3x size boost in 20% treatment cohort

rules.description: BTC SHORT at 90%+ confidence: 67.4% WR, $4425 PnL on 46 trades — amplify this edge
rules.problem: BTC SHORT high confidence is the single largest profit source. Not being specifically amplified.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20%: BTC SHORT signals at 90%+ confidence get 1.5x size boost
rules.note: Rule exists but never fires — diagnostic investigation needed

rules.description: SOL LONG in trending regime shows edge — 58%+ WR when regime filter applied
rules.problem: SOL LONG overall 53% WR but trending-only subset shows 58%+ WR. Regime filter needed.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20%: SOL LONG in trending regime gets +5pt confidence boost

rules.description: ETH SELL signals when BB squeeze + RSI > 70 — identified golden pattern
rules.problem: ETH SHORT with bollinger band squeeze + overbought RSI shows historically high accuracy
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20%: ETH SHORT signals meeting BB+RSI criteria get 1.25x size boost

rules.description: BB+MTQ combination in low-volume sessions produces false signals — block
rules.problem: MTQ strategy + BB squeeze in low-volume (Asian session) context produces 28% WR
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate at 20%: Block BB+MTQ combo signals in low-volume session windows

rules.description: ALL confidence bins are systematically overconfident by 15-34 points vs realized WR. 90%+ conf = 56% WR (34pt gap); 80-90% = 60% WR (25pt gap). Existing rules target 60-70% bin but ignore upper-bin inflation.
rules.problem: High-conf signals (80%+) are overconfident by 25-34 points. HIGH_CONF_SHORT_edge promotes 90%+ shorts based on WR data, but the confidence number itself is unreliable — sizing and filter decisions are trusting inflated confidence scores across ALL bins. confidence_scorer.py likely has systematic inflation.
rules.fix_applied: AUDIT_ONLY: flag for human review of confidence_scorer.py. No auto-gate yet — needs root cause analysis.

rules.description: HYPE SHORT confirmed negative EV: -$16.65/trade on 239 live trades (WR=54.4%, avg_win=$105, avg_loss=-$162)
rules.problem: HYPE SHORT has structurally bad R:R (0.65x) and negative EV despite >50% WR. Avg loss 54% larger than avg win.
rules.fix_applied: A/B gate active at 20% — route 20% of HYPE SHORT signals to skip; track treatment vs baseline
rules.action: Block HYPE SHORT entirely (matching HYPE_LONG_hard_block). HYPE is net -$5013 on 397 trades.

rules.description: llm_regime column is EMPTY in all 965 trades — regime-based A/B rules cannot be measured
rules.problem: 17 regime-based A/B rules (ILLIQUID_regime_block, TOD_morning_edge, etc.) have no treatment_wr because the regime field is never written to trades.csv
rules.fix_applied: PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW — need to wire llm_regime capture at trade-close time
rules.action: Wire llm_regime to trades.csv close event in position_manager.py or multi_strategy_main.py

rules.description: duration_h is 0.0 for ALL trades in trades.csv — HoldTimeRuleManager is neutered
rules.problem: The hold-time rule (min 3h trend trades) cannot be measured because duration_h=0.0 for all closed trades. The fix is in backtest/engine.py or position_manager.py close event.
rules.fix_applied: PENDING_DEV_FIX — code change needed at bot/backtest/engine.py ~line 2522
rules.action: Fix: duration_h = (close_ts - open_ts).total_seconds() / 3600 at close event

rules.description: Confidence floor at 70% — signals below this threshold are blocked entirely
rules.problem: 60-70% confidence band produces -$2321 PnL on 123 trades (-$18.87/trade). Hard floor prevents these from ever executing.
rules.fix_applied: Gate at 80%: 80% of sub-70-confidence signals blocked. Graduated from soft to hard.
rules.action: Block all signals with confidence < 70 in signal_pipeline.py
rules.gate_note: Run119 auto-fix: gate reset from 50 to 20 for live deployment probe. Run120: maintained at 20.

rules.description: HYPE confirmed negative EV across all directions — size cap 0.5x is essential
rules.problem: HYPE total: -$5013 on 397 trades. Even HYPE LONG (57% WR) has negative avg PnL (-$6.55/trade). No direction is profitable.
rules.fix_applied: Confirm HYPE_EV_CONFIRMED_NEGATIVE (0.5x size) is hardwired. No override path should exist.

rules.description: record_outcome() passes LONG/SHORT but rules expect BUY/SELL — accuracy tracking broken
rules.problem: Rule accuracy cannot be tracked because side vocabulary mismatch prevents record_outcome from matching trade sides to rule conditions
rules.fix_applied: APPLIED: multi_strategy_main.py:3257 — convert LONG->BUY, SHORT->SELL before calling record_outcome()

rules.source: PERPETUAL_IMPROVEMENT_HOURLY_2026_04_26 — live vs meta_learning contradiction (18 morning trades)
rules.description: WATCHLIST: Morning live WR=28% on 18 trades (-$76.94) contradicts meta_learning claim of 71% morning WR. Insufficient n to suspend but flagging.
rules.problem: meta_learning/insights.json consistently claims morning (6-12 UTC) = 71% WR. Live data shows morning = 28% WR on 18 trades, -$76.94. This is the second meta_learning insight contradiction found. TOD_morning_edge rule has been disabled (Run120).
rules.fix_applied: WATCHLIST: Morning rule disabled Run120. Re-evaluate after 25+ live morning trades.

rules.description: Feedback state files missing after bot restart — persistence layer needs hardening
rules.problem: signal_quality.json, regime_feedback_state.json, confidence_state.json all missing after extended offline period. Feedback systems start from scratch on each restart.
rules.fix_applied: PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW — need to implement state file backup/restore in feedback manager init

rules.description: HYPE SHORT >= 75% confidence is catastrophic: -$70.06/trade, 31.2% WR (n=77). The existing hype_short_veto_v1 incorrectly blanket-blocks all HYPE SHORTs including the profitable <75% band (+$8-15/trade, n=80).
rules.problem: HYPE SHORT split: <70% conf = 60.0% WR +$15.27/trade (n=15); 70-75% = 52.3% +$8.91/trade (n=65); 75%+ = 31.2% -$70.06/trade (n=77). Blanket veto is wrong direction for <75% band.
rules.fix_applied: TRACKING_ONLY — confidence=71% (below 75% auto-apply threshold). Awaiting live confirmation before splitting hype_short_veto. To be graduated in Run121+ if confidence rises.
rules.upgrade_condition: Apply gate split (veto >= 75%, allow < 75%) when confidence reaches 75% or n >= 100 live HYPE SHORT trades confirm <75% WR >= 50%.
